title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 351.1180 - Court supervision of dissolution, when
text:
351.1180.  Court supervision of dissolution, when. — After a notice of intent to dissolve has been filed with the secretary of state and before a certificate of dissolution has been issued, the cooperative or, for good cause shown, a member or creditor may apply to a court within the county where the registered address is located to have the dissolution conducted or continued under the supervision of the court.
(L. 2011 S.B. 366)
